deltas.summary: Assistant repeatedly confused the storage mapper ownership boundary.
deltas.expectation: Check the mapper before editing storage.
deltas.reality: The assistant edited storage when mapper code owned the behavior.
deltas.impact: Review churn increased before implementation could continue.
